document.name: Bétés Restaurant
document.shortDescription: Neighborhood bistro in Corvin-negyed — Hungarian-European plates and wine near Futó utca.
document.longDescription:
Bétés on Futó utca serves refined Hungarian and European dishes with a neighborhood feel steps from Corvin Plaza. The dining room suits casual dates and business lunches in Corvin-negyed. Reserve on betesetterem.hu.

Sources: https://www.betesetterem.hu/
